summary: Successfully tested Asset-ID Configuration Admin UI (new feature). All 9 backend API tests passed. Frontend UI verified: Settings -> System -> Asset-ID Konfig with 3 tabs (Präfix, Zähler, Formate) and reset counter modal working correctly.
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_asset_id_config.py - New test file with 9 test cases
seed_data_creation: No seed data created - using existing test data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Asset-ID Config Admin UI is working. To access: 1) Login to /portal/admin with admin@tsrid.com/admin123 2) Click 'Settings' tab 3) Expand 'System' category 4) Click 'Asset-ID Konfig'. The page has 3 tabs: Präfix (prefix config), Zähler (counter view with Anpassen button), Formate (shows all device type ID formats). Counter shows TSRID Tablet i7 has '4 Geräte' already created with next ID being TSRID-TAB-i7-0005.

features_tested.GET /api/asset-mgmt/asset-id-config: PASS - Returns config with warehouse_prefix and formats list
features_tested.GET /api/asset-mgmt/asset-id-config/next: PASS - Returns next ID: TSRID-TAB-i7-0005 (after 4 existing devices)
features_tested.POST /api/asset-mgmt/asset-id-config/res: PASS - Returns warning if existing devices have higher sequences
features_tested.Frontend: Präfix Tab: PASS - Shows prefix input 'TSRID' with Speichern button and live preview
features_tested.Frontend: Zähler Tab: PASS - Shows table with Gerätetyp, Bereits erstellt (4 Geräte for tab_tsr_i7), Nächste ID, Anpassen button
features_tested.Frontend: Formate Tab: PASS - Shows all device types grouped by category with Lager-ID and Standort-ID examples
features_tested.Frontend: Reset Counter Modal: PASS - Opens with warning, number input, preview, and ZURÜCKSETZEN confirmation

api_endpoints_tested.result: Returns config with warehouse_prefix='TSRID' and formats list
Returns warning about existing devices with higher sequences

ui_elements_verified.Info Banner: Shows Lager-ID and Standort-ID format explanation
ui_elements_verified.Präfix Tab: Input field, Speichern button, live preview of TSRID-TAB-i7-0001 and TSRID-SCA-DSK-0001
ui_elements_verified.Zähler Tab: Table with device types, counts (4 Geräte for tab_tsr_i7), next IDs, Anpassen buttons
ui_elements_verified.Formate Tab: Categorized list with warehouse and location ID examples for each device type
ui_elements_verified.Reset Modal: Title, description, number input with preview, warning, ZURÜCKSETZEN confirmation, buttons
